text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling peckish, I head to a local ramen spot.
Outside, I see some familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Give it your best shot, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yup! I'll do my darndest!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You just gotta concentrate, is all!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Concentrate! ...Nrrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty, here I go! I'm going in full steam ahead,
just you wait and see!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hope you've all come hungry! The 65th Ramen
Race is about to kick off!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Which one of our plucky contenders will be the
first to conquer twenty-four bowls of our shop's
finest ramen?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Glory to those who hunger for ramen—and
victory! Get ready... Get set... DIG IIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're much more likely to feel fuller faster if you
go all-in from the start! Conserve your energy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget to scope the competition! Stay in the
middle of the pack until the time's right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you got this! Keep up that pace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a heated competition, the end is finally in
sight.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Om nom nom!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week maintains her pace while keeping
an eye on the frontline contenders!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
They've cleared the hill. All that's left is the final
spurt.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right everyone, time to get your cheer on!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Go go gooooooo, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Raaaaagh! Om nom nom nom!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week speeds up, quickly overtaking the
competition! One slurp! Two slurps! She's passed
them by!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Best eater in all of Japan, here I cooooome!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And it's Special Week! Special Week has
devoured the last of the ramen to take first place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um, thanks for all your support today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
My dream of eating my fill of The Lion's Share's
ramen has come true, and it's all thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I didn't quite know how to react
when I first heard about this dream of yours.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You seem to be in low spirits, Special Week. Has
something happened?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eurgh. Actually, I'm having trouble losing weight.
There's a race I want to enter, but I'm starting to
wonder if I should just give up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so your efforts aren't going to plan. What
race were you hoping to enter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The Ramen Race...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I realize that racing is the lifeblood of every
Umamusume at the academy, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Wait. The what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I nearly gave up on entering the race, but you all
threw your support behind me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to your help that I could take on this
challenge with no worries!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Putting aside the fact that I imagined an entirely
different race, I am more than willing to help a
friend when they have their heart set on pursuing
a dream.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's just like in a real race, isn't it? We rely on the
strength of others... to reach our dreams.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's because of your support that I can put
everything I have into running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're absolutely right.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okey-doke! Time to set a new goal—slim down
and get back to my dream of being the best racer
in Japan! I'm ready and rar'n to go!
